name: Balsamic Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. In a jar, combine the mustard, vinegar, water, lemon juice, dried tarragon, and garlic.
2. Shake well to combine.
3. Add the safflower oil and virgin olive oil, then shake again.
4. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Chill before serving. Makes about 3/4 cup, which serves 12 (1 tbsp each).
Food Exchange per serving: 1 FAT EXCHANGE; CAL: 44; CHO: 0mg; CAR: 1g; PRO: 0g; SOD: 36mg; FAT: 5g.
